title: Yann LeCun On Artificial General Intelligence And The ...
excerpts:
Section Title: Yann LeCun On Artificial General Intelligence And The Digital Commons
Content:
“Unfortunately, the real world is messy,” said Yann LeCun, former head of research at Meta, in our Imagination in Action event at Davos. “Sensory data is high-dimensional, continuous, noisy, and generative architectures do not work with this kind of data. So the type of architecture that we use for LLMs and generative AI does not apply to the real world. The next revolution of AI, which is coming fast, is going to be AI systems that understand the real world.”
LeCun is a prominent voice in AI, who pioneered convolutional neural networks, a foundation of modern computer vision and deep learning. After earning a Ph.D. in France, he worked at Bell Labs on learning algorithms and deployed OCR systems, and later joined New York University’s Courant Institute as a professor. In 2013 he helped create Meta’s FAIR research lab and served for years as the company’s Chief AI Scientist, championing open,
